# XcrowHub

> XcrowHub is a non-custodial escrow platform for peer-to-peer crypto deals. Money is locked in a protected hold until the buyer confirms delivery. Zero fees on private deals, 1% seller-side fee on marketplace listings. Built on Nimiq (NIM) and Polygon (USDT).

XcrowHub protects buyers and sellers during P2P crypto transactions — freelance work, digital goods, services, one-time deals, and recurring marketplace listings. Both parties can see the deal status at every step. Disputes are decided by a human admin reviewing evidence, never by automatic payout.

## Key facts

- Domain: https://www.xcrowhub.com
- Category: Escrow / P2P payments / Freelance protection
- Chains: Nimiq (NIM) mainnet, Polygon (USDT ERC-20)
- Wallet: Nimiq Pay Mini App (also usable in browser)
- Private deals: 0% fee
- Marketplace deals: 1% seller-side fee
- Beta cap: 10 active deals per seller
- Custody: Hot wallet held by a hardened signer service; keys never in the browser
- Dispute resolution: Both sides submit proof; a human admin decides release / refund / split
- Referral: Referrer earns 10% of the platform fee on every marketplace sale of anyone they refer, forever

## How it works

1. Seller creates a deal — sets item, price (NIM or USDT), and delivery terms. Gets a private link or publishes it on the marketplace.
2. Buyer pays into the escrow hold — funds are locked, visible to both parties, and do not go directly to the seller.
3. Seller delivers and marks it as delivered, optionally attaching proof.
4. Buyer confirms receipt → funds are released to the seller. If contested, a proof window opens for both, and an admin decides.

## Two ways to deal

- **Private deal** — direct link between one seller and one buyer, not listed publicly. 0% fee. Best for freelance work, one-time custom orders, and repeat clients.
- **Marketplace listing** — publish a service or digital product, buyers can pay the listed price or send a bid. 1% seller-side fee. Best for reusable offers with multiple buyers.
